𝗙𝗥𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗬 | To significantly improve Android device battery life by optimizing and restricting background Google services and other power-hungry processes.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To significantly improve Android device battery life by optimizing and restricting background Google services and other power-hungry processes.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ GMS Freezing across 8 categories
✅ App Doze and Deep Doze for aggressive background restrictions
✅ Screen Off Optimization (disabling connections, RAM cleaner)
✅ Kill Google Tracking (analytics, telemetry, ad tracking)
✅ Kernel Tweaks (scheduler, VM, network)
✅ RAM Optimizer (ZRAM, LMK, VM params)
✅ System Props optimization
✅ Log Killing
✅ Battery Saver Tuner


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 171 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 7 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Frosty is an advanced Android module designed to significantly enhance battery life by freezing Google Mobile Services (GMS) and implementing system-wide doze optimizations. It offers granular control over GMS categories, app dozing, background restrictions, and screen-off optimizations, all configurable via a WebUI.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Drsexo/Frosty

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗟 | To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and temporary email receiving service for various applications, including testing, automation (like 2FA), and privacy-focused sign-ups.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐘 PHP 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and temporary email receiving service for various applications, including testing, automation (like 2FA), and privacy-focused sign-ups.
📅 Created: Aug 2019 • Updated: Jul 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Python-powered mail server
✅ RSS feed for every email address
✅ JSON API for integration
✅ Webhooks with customizable payloads
✅ Handles attachments
✅ Supports Plaintext, STARTTLS, and TLS on connect
✅ Web interface with email management
✅ 100% file-based storage
✅ Can be used as an email honeypot or for programmatic 2FA solutions
✅ No need to pre-create email addresses


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 897 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 75 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 13 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Open Trashmail is a self-hosted, open-source solution for managing temporary email addresses. It provides a mail server that can receive emails and make them accessible via a web interface, JSON API, RSS feed, and custom webhooks, without requiring pre-creation of email addresses.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/HaschekSolutions/opentrashmail

𝗨𝗟𝗧𝗥𝗔 | Performance profiling and analysis of .NET applications on Windows and macOS.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔷 C# 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Performance profiling and analysis of .NET applications on Windows and macOS.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Sampling profiler (ETW on Windows, EventPipe on macOS ARM64)
✅ UI based on https://profiler.firefox.com/
✅ Timeline, Flamegraph, Call Tree, Marker Chart visualizations
✅ Precise kernel, native, and managed function call stacks
✅ .NET GC Memory track
✅ JIT Compile Time Event Markers
✅ GC Events Markers
✅ Lightweight trace files
✅ Requires net8.0+ via dotnet global tool


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 22 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Ultra is an advanced profiler for .NET applications on Windows and macOS, providing detailed performance insights through sampling and ETW/EventPipe data. It visualizes performance data using a UI similar to Firefox Profiler, offering features like timeline, flamegraph, and call tree views.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗔𝗨𝗧𝗢𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗗-𝗔𝗜-𝗪𝗘𝗕-𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗥-𝗢𝗟𝗟𝗔𝗠𝗔 | To automate the process of online research by using an LLM to identify research topics, gather information from the web, and synthesize findings.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate the process of online research by using an LLM to identify research topics, gather information from the web, and synthesize findings.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automated research planning with prioritized focus areas
✅ Systematic web searching and content analysis
✅ All research content and source URLs saved into a detailed text document
✅ Research summary generation
✅ Post-research Q&A capability about findings
✅ Self-improving search mechanism
✅ Rich console output with status indicators
✅ Comprehensive answer synthesis using web-sourced information
✅ Research conversation mode for exploring findings


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 276 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository transforms a locally run LLM via Ollama into an automated web researcher. It takes a single query, breaks it down into researchable focus areas, performs web searches, scrapes content, and compiles findings into a document. The LLM can then summarize the research and answer questions about it.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/TheBlewish/Automated-AI-Web-Researcher-Ollama

𝗣𝗗𝗙-𝗥𝗔𝗚-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | Enabling users to have conversational interactions with the content of PDF documents.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to have conversational interactions with the content of PDF documents.
📅 Created: Jul 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ RAG application for chatting with PDF files
✅ Vectorizes uploaded PDFs
✅ Uses pre-trained models for text generation
✅ ReactJS and TypeScript frontend
✅ FastAPI backend
✅ Langchain Sentence Transformers for embeddings
✅ ChromaDB for vector storage
✅ Google Gemini API for prompt processing
✅ Drag and drop PDF upload


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 14 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PageSage is a web application that enables users to interact with PDF documents by leveraging Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). It allows users to upload PDFs, which are then vectorized and processed by a language model to answer user queries within the context of the document.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪
